docs.name: 3D Tilt Card
docs.description: Perspective-shifting card that tilts toward the cursor with parallax layers and glare overlay.

props.name: children
props.description: The element(s) suspended inside the 3D card layout.

props.name: className
props.description: Tailwind configuration applied directly to the physical card.

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: Tailwind bounds defining the invisible hover hit-box.

props.name: tiltMaxDeg
props.description: The maximum angle the card aggressively pitches on hover.

props.name: perspective
props.description: The CSS perspective depth in pixels determining 3D deformation strength.

props.name: scale
props.description: Float multiplier for card scaling when hovered (e.g. 1.05).

props.name: glare
props.description: Enable a dynamic radial-gradient glare sweep that tracks the pointer.

props.name: glareMaxOpacity
props.description: Max brightness (0 to 1) for the dynamic glare effect.

docs.usageCode:
import { TiltCard } from "@/components/ui/3d-tilt-card"; export default function Example() { return (

Hover me

Move your cursor over this card to see the 3D tilt effect with glare.

Extra Tilt

This card has a stronger tilt angle for a more dramatic effect.

); }

docs.overview: TiltCard responds to mouse position with a spring-driven 3D tilt effect, giving wrapped content a realistic depth. An optional glare overlay reinforces the illusion.

scenarios.title: Feature highlight card
scenarios.description: Wrap a feature card so users instinctively interact with it, naturally exploring the depth effect.

scenarios.title: Profile / team member card
scenarios.description: Give each team member card a tactile feel to make the About page more engaging.

scenarios.title: Pricing tier card
scenarios.description: Apply a gentle tilt to pricing cards so the recommended plan naturally commands attention on hover.
